name: Pack Of 12 - Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Chicken Salmon And Zucchini 50g
description: Spectrum Gusto Soup with Chicken, Salmon, and Zucchini is a nutritious 50g wet cat food designed as a complementary treat or meal supplement. Combining high-quality chicken, salmon, and zucchini, this soup offers light protein, minimal fat, and 90% moisture to keep cats hydrated. Ideal for cats of all ages, it encourages healthy snacking while supporting overall well-being. The savory fish broth enhances flavor, making even picky eaters eager for every portion. Key Benefits: Supports hydration with a high-moisture formula. Provides moderate protein and omega-3s from chicken and salmon. Includes zucchini for fiber, vitamins, and digestive support. Light, low-fat treat suitable for daily rewards. Easy-to-serve 50g pouch. Feeding Instructions: Serve in small portions with a spoon. Complementary food only; not a complete meal. Always provide fresh water alongside feeding. Meta Description:
